document:
CONFIDENTIAL - TERMINATION NOTICE

To: Amit Sharma
Employee ID: EMP-29471
Department: Engineering
Date: March 15, 2026

Dear Amit,

This letter confirms the termination of your employment effective March 31, 2026. Your final salary of ₹18,50,000 will be processed to your HDFC Bank account ending in 4829. Your performance review scores of 2.1/5 for the last two quarters were below the minimum threshold.

Your manager, Rajesh Kumar, and HR representative Sneha Patel (sneha.patel@company.com) have documented the performance improvement plan discussions. Please return your laptop and badge to the Whitefield office.

Your health insurance (Policy #MED-88421) covering your pre-existing asthma condition will remain active until April 30, 2026. COBRA continuation details will be sent to your registered address at 42 Brigade Road, Bangalore 560025.

Contact HR at ext. 4421 or Sneha directly at 080-4555-0192 for any questions.

Sincerely,
VP Human Resources
expected_redacted:

compliance_context: DPDP Act 2023 (India) and internal data protection policy

expected_findings.recommended_action: Ensure data principal consent for processing
Restrict access to HR and payroll only
Must have explicit consent; encrypt at rest and in transit
Store only for legitimate business purpose; delete after separation

PATIENT DISCHARGE SUMMARY
Fortis Hospital, Bangalore
Date: February 20, 2026

Patient: Kavitha Reddy, Age: 45, Female
Patient ID: PAT-772901
Admission Date: February 14, 2026

Diagnosis: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus with diabetic retinopathy. Patient also has a history of clinical depression managed with Sertraline 50mg.

Treatment: Insulin glargine 20 units daily, laser photocoagulation for retinopathy performed on Feb 16. Psychiatric consult by Dr. Meena Rao recommended continuing current medication.

Discharge Medications: Insulin glargine, Metformin 1000mg, Sertraline 50mg, Aspirin 75mg.

Follow-up: Ophthalmology appointment on March 5, 2026 with Dr. Suresh at the Indiranagar clinic. Psychiatry follow-up in 4 weeks.

Emergency Contact: Husband - Venkat Reddy, Phone: 080-2555-0834. Residence: 18, 3rd Cross, HSR Layout, Bangalore 560102.

Insurance: Star Health Policy #SH-4429017, covering self and spouse.

Attending Physician: Dr. Arun Mathew, MD Internal Medicine
Signature: _____________

Store with minimum retention; provide access only on need-to-know basis

document:
LEGAL MEMO - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Re: Workplace Harassment Complaint - Case #HR-2026-0089

Complainant: Nisha Verma, Senior Analyst, Finance Team
Employee ID: EMP-18823
Date Filed: January 28, 2026

Ms. Verma reported that her direct supervisor, Karthik Menon (EMP-09412), made repeated unwanted advances between November 2025 and January 2026. Witnesses include team members Aditi Shah and Rohan Desai.

During the investigation interview on Feb 3, Ms. Verma disclosed that the incidents worsened her existing PTSD condition, for which she sees Dr. Lakshmi Iyer at Mindspace Clinic, MG Road, Bangalore. She is currently on Paroxetine 20mg.

Mr. Menon resides at 55 Cunningham Road, Bangalore 560052. His personal email is k.menon.personal@gmail.com and phone is 99800-12345.

Ms. Verma's contact: nisha.v@company.com, personal: nisha.verma92@outlook.com. She lives at Flat 204, Prestige Lakeside, Whitefield, Bangalore 560066.

Recommendation: Immediate suspension of Mr. Menon pending full investigation. Offer Ms. Verma paid medical leave and EAP counseling.

compliance_context: DPDP Act 2023 (India), POSH Act 2013, and GDPR (if data shared with EU offices)

expected_findings.recommended_action: Complainant identity must be strictly protected; limit access to IC members only
Health data requires explicit consent; store separately from HR records
Personal email not needed for investigation; collect only work email
Home address not relevant to harassment investigation; do not retain

document:
INSURANCE CLAIM INVESTIGATION REPORT
Claim #: INS-2026-44821
Date: March 1, 2026

Claimant: Arjun Nair, Age 38, Male
Policy: LIC Jeevan Anand #94821-A, Premium: ₹24,000/year

Mr. Nair filed a claim for hospitalization at Manipal Hospital on Feb 10, 2026 for acute pancreatitis. Medical records indicate a history of alcohol dependency (noted in Dr. Srinivas's records from 2023).

Claimant's Details:
- Address: 12, 2nd Main, Indiranagar, Bangalore 560038
- Phone: 98451-67890
- Email: arjun.nair@personal.in
- Aadhaar: 4523 8901 2367 (verified)
- PAN: ABCPN1234F

Spouse: Divya Nair, nominated beneficiary. Her Aadhaar: 7891 2345 6780.

Investigator Notes: Visited claimant's residence. Neighbor Mrs. Padma confirmed Mr. Nair was hospitalized. Hospital billing shows ₹3,45,000 in expenses. Dr. Priya Menon (Manipal Hospital) confirmed diagnosis.

Recommendation: Approve claim. No evidence of fraud.
